subcodes.first_line: O compassionate Lord! Make these companions to be helpers, and bestow upon these friends the grace of worship at Thy sacred threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان این یاران را یاوران نما و این دوستان را پرستش آستان بخش روز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God
